login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your email. If you don't remember the password, we can send you a link instead.
login.magic_link_sent: Sent a link to your email. Open it on this device.
login.error_generic: Sign-in failed. Please try again in a moment.
login.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.

unlock.title: Unlock account
unlock.subtitle_biometric: With Face ID or your 4-digit PIN.
unlock.locked: PIN entry locked. Please wait {{minutes}} min or use Face ID.

reset.request_body: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
reset.request_sent: Check your email. The link will bring you back here.
reset.error_link_expired: The link has expired. Request a new one.
reset.error_generic: Couldn't save right now — try again in a moment.
